chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6698 of 2019 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Hearing 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 07-04-2025 None present for the petitioner Mr. Javed Hussain, advocate holds brief for Ms. Masooda Siraj, advocate for respondent department. Mr. Muhammad Ahmed, D.A.G. This petition is pending since 2019 without any significant progress. Petitioner is unrepresented without any intimation or justification. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
